side_effects.description: GHK-Cu vial developed visible flakes/particles after reconstitution with vendor bacteriostatic water
Tesamorelin turned into gel after reconstitution with same vendor's bacteriostatic water

protocol_notes: Used vendor-supplied bacteriostatic water (3ml vial that was under volume) to reconstitute GHK-Cu and Tesamorelin. Experienced contamination issues with vendor's bac water. Switched to Hospira bacteriostatic water for subsequent reconstitution with clean results. Discarded contaminated vials. Changed vendors.
